skill2: Effects vary according to squad formation. Only one set of effects is applied.
Affects self if there are no other Defender allies in the squad.
Effect 2: Attract: Taunt all enemies continuously.
Affects self if there is another Defender ally in the squad.
Effect 1: Ninjutsu Camouflage: Prevents being targeted by single-target attacks for 10 sec. This effect is removed upon taking a direct hit.
Effect 2: Ninjutsu Injection: Recovers 11.22% of attack damage as HP continuously.
Activates when performing 200 normal attack(s). Affects self while in Attract status.
Creates a Shield equal to 12.25% of the skill user's final Max HP for 10 sec.
Function: Stores up HP recovery for a time, after which all allies are healed for the stored amount.
Effect 1: The maximum amount stored is equal to 165.28% of the skill user's final ATK.
Effect 2: Once the duration ends, all allies are healed for the stored recovery amount.
burst: Maximum Accumulation of Ninjutsu IFAK ▲ 20.13% for 10 sec.
